title: An Act to enhance protections against child exploitation and misuse of emerging technologies

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Paulino of Methuen, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 1931) of Francisco E. Paulino for legislation to enhance protections against child exploitation and misuse of emerging technologies.  The Judiciary.
